title: Rivian Stock Price Targets and Support Levels
text: Rivian trades near $14.48 as of early May 2026, down significantly from its January opening despite a recovery attempt in February and April. Wall Street maintains a generally cautious stance with mixed outlooks. Average consensus target is $18.52, implying meaningful upside but falling short of the $20 level. Bullish outlooks include Wedbush rating the stock outperform with a $25 target; Deutsche Bank upgraded to buy at $23. Mid-range targets include Cantor Fitzgerald recently increasing its target to $19, while BNP Paribas and Canaccord both target $22. Achieving consistent $20+ levels requires several catalysts: smooth R2 SUV customer deliveries and positive reviews, strong orders for affordable model variants, continued Volkswagen milestone payments, evidence of improving gross margins and controlled cash burn, and broader market tailwinds like lower interest rates. This recovery is characterized as ambitious but not impossible if execution clicks.
